canonical_definition: An English-only intent detection dataset with 150 intent classes across 10 domains, used as a source for culturally adapted utterance generation in INJONGO.
papers: CCHall: A Novel Benchmark for Joint Cross-Lingual and Cross-Modal Hallucinations Detection in Large Language Models
